subject: Phase 1 — Audit packet-forwarder seams (detailed)
description: 8-facet opus workflow auditing: raw tap point + decoupled worker, processed-history object + param keys, udp-config ports/sets, UDP/HTTP/HTTPS transports + auth types, ClickHouse forward-log model + 30-day retention, backend config-domain CRUD + dynamic reload, FE config+summary patterns, dashboard. Write to docs/specs/packet-forwarder/audit/.
